title: Alliant Energy Corp Stock Just Hit an All-Time High. Here Are 3 Tailwinds Boosting the Stock.
author: Courtney Carlsen
description: Alliant Energy's stock has surged 12.4% year-to-date, hitting an all-time high, driven by three key factors: robust demand from AI data centers in the Midwest with 3 GW of contracted load and 2-4 GW in negotiations, favorable regulatory conditions in Iowa and Wisconsin providing earnings visibility, and a 17% increase in capital expenditure to $13.4 billion to expand capacity through natural gas, energy storage, and renewable energy investments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is benefiting from strong tailwinds including surging demand from AI data centers (3 GW contracted, 2-4 GW in negotiations), favorable regulatory conditions in Iowa and Wisconsin providing earnings predictability, and a substantial $13.4 billion capital investment plan supporting 12% projected rate base growth and 5-7% EPS growth through 2029.

title: Meta Stock Continues To Slide: What's Going On?
author: Evette Mitkov
description: Meta Platforms announced a $1 billion data center investment in Wisconsin while facing scrutiny over potential accounting practices, with investor Michael Burry raising concerns about potential earnings overstatement.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed signals of significant AI infrastructure investment balanced by accounting practice concerns
Mentioned as a partner in Meta's data center infrastructure project

title: Is Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Utilities ETF (RSPU) a Strong ETF Right Now?
author: Zacks.Com
description: The article discusses the Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Utilities ETF (RSPU), a smart beta exchange-traded fund that offers exposure to the utilities and infrastructure sector. The ETF has performed well year-to-date and over the past 12 months, and the article compares it to other similar ETFs in the space.
keywords: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Utilities ETF

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The ETF has performed well year-to-date and over the past 12 months, and the article suggests it is a reasonable option for investors seeking to outperform the utilities/infrastructure sector.

title: CMS Energy (CMS), Jupiter Ink Deal for 100MW Battery Storage
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: CMS Energy (CMS) is set to add 100 MW of battery storage in collaboration with Jupiter Power, which will help CMS achieve its clean energy goal.

title: DTE Energy (DTE) to Build 220MW Michigan Energy Storage Center
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: DTE Energy (DTE) to build a battery energy storage center in the Great Lakes region, which will benefit its consumers by decreasing the grid's load.
